Diploma Supplement

MENU

What is a Diploma Supplement?

The Diploma Supplement which was developed by the European Commission, Council of Europe and UNESCO/CEPES accompanies a higher education diploma and aims at providing sufficient independent data to improve the international “transparency” and fair academic and professional recognition of qualifications (diplomas, degrees, certificates etc...). It is designed to provide a description of the nature, level, context, content and status of the studies that were pursued and successfully completed by the individual named on the original qualification to which this supplement is appended. It is free from any value judgements, equivalence statements or suggestions about recognition.

For detailed information please visit the website.

Diploma Supplement in English is delivered automatically and free of charge to all Istanbul Okan University graduates with their Diplomas.

Diploma Supplement consists of the following eight sections:

Information identifying the holder of the qualification

Information identifying the qualification

Information on the level of the qualification

Information on the contents and results gained

Information on the function of the qualification

Additional information

Certification of the supplement

Information on the national higher education system

What does a Diploma Supplement offer to students?

easier access to opportunities of work or further studies abroad

a diploma that is more readable and easily comparable abroad

a precise description of their academic career and the competencies acquired during the study period

a transparent and objective description of their achievements and competencies

foster their employability abroad

What are the benefits for the institutions?

It facilitates academic and professional recognition to increase the transparency of qualifications

It protects national/institutional autonomy while offering a common frame which is accepted all over Europe

It promotes informed judgements about qualifications that can be understood in another educational context

It raises the visibility of the institution abroad

It promotes the employability of their graduates at national and international level

It helps to save time since it provides the answers to a lot of recurrent questions put to administrative services in institutions about the content and portability of diplomas

Who can get a Diploma Supplement?

Diploma Supplement in English is issued to all Istanbul Okan University graduates automatically and free of any charges upon their graduation.

Where/ How can you get your Diploma Supplement?

Diplomas and Diploma Supplements are issued for all Istanbul Okan University Graduates. Diplomas and Diploma Supplements to undergraduate students are delivered from the Registrar’s Office on Tuzla Campus, to graduate students from the Registrar’s Office in Mecidiyeköy Campus. Diploma Supplement may only be given to the student in person; not to a third person.

What it is not?

Diploma Supplement is not a Curriculum Vitae(CV)

It is not a substitute for the original transcript of records or diploma or qualification,

It is not an automatic system that guarantees recognition

For more Information please visit the website.
